infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Travel Buddy uses your location to show your position on the trip map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Travel Buddy uses your location to show your position on the trip map.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Travel Buddy uses your location to show your position on the trip map.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Travel Buddy to access your photos to attach receipt images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Travel Buddy to take photos of receipts.
